news.t: Sponsor of The Fundamental Income Net Lease Real Estate ETF (NYSE: NETL) Announces Rebranding to The Colterpoint Net Lease Real Estate ETF (NYSE: NETL), and a 5.00% Increase to Monthly Dividend, Targeting 10.5 cents per Month, or ~$1.26 per Year

holdings.infoBox: NETL is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are W. P. Carey stock at 8.19%, NNN REIT at 8.18%, Agree Realty at 7.46%, Realty Income at 7.45%, and VICI Properties at 7.45%.

overview.description: The Colterpoint Net Lease Real Estate ETF (NETL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Colterpoint Net Lease Real Estate index. The fund tracks an index that provides current income by investing in net lease US real estate equities weighted by a modified market-cap strategy. NETL was launched on Mar 22, 2019 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
infoTable: Colterpoint Net Lease Real Estate Index
